name: Kolachki
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
2. Create a well in the center and add the milk, eggs, and butter.
3. Combine until smooth and form a soft dough.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
6. Roll out dough on a floured surface to about 1/2-inch thickness.
7. Cut into circles using a round cutter, reserve the scraps.
8. Warm oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
9. Gently place each circle into hot oil and fry until golden brown on both sides.
10. Remove from oil and drain on paper towels.
11. Place fried kolachki onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
12. Bake for 10 minutes, then remove from oven.
13. Cool completely before serving or storing.
Note: Do not overfill the dough as it may cause spillage during frying.
